title: ctenitis deflexa
intro: Ctenitis deflexa, also known as the lance fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The lance fern is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ctenitis deflexa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Ctenitis deflexa can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
